TEXT.source: Presidential apology to indigenous people in Kanakanavu

S.FORM: sinatʉ kari Cai'ingwxn cungtung taihiu sehu musu'ʉvʉ maraini na Iencumincu
S.PHON: sinatɨ kar~ɾi ʦaiʔiŋw*n ʦuŋtuŋ taihiu sehu musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾaini na ienʦuminʦu
S.FORM: sinatʉ kari Cai'ingwxn cungtung taihiu sehu musu'ʉvʉ maraini na Iencumincu
S.PHON: sinatɨ kar~ɾi ʦaiʔiŋw*n ʦuŋtuŋ taihiu sehu musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾaini na ienʦuminʦu
S.TRANSL: 蔡英文總統代表政府 向原住民族道歉文。
President Tsai Ing-wen's Apology to the Indigenous Peoples on Behalf of the Government.

S.FORM: 'esi na niaca'iva cu mapusan urucin cenana taniara miaasua soni. niarisinata na sienfa sua "sanpau" kisʉʉn ia, pati'ʉnʉ'ʉnʉʉn cu "Iencumin" kisʉʉn. sua sipatanganai isi ia, ka'anʉ cu makai miana, 'una ti'ingi 'esi masicuru'u 'imiin. parasurucuʉn cu Cau Vuvurung tamna nganai, "masiiraru cauin" sua 'ʉnai Taiwan isi. muuciri kita nesi. soni, te kita musuruusuru kiracʉkʉʉcʉkʉ. te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na kavangvang Cau Vuvurung. 'una nipamucia, te kita mangucunu navungu musu'ʉvʉ. niaca'iva cu usʉʉpatʉ mʉna cenana isi. nimuru'inasʉ kamu. koo kamu katʉtʉnʉn arakukunuʉn. te ku taihiu sehu, maraini misee kamua.
S.PHON: ʔesi na niaʦaʔiva ʦu mapusan ur~ɾuʦin ʦenana taniar~ɾa miaasua soni. niar~ɾisinata na sienfa sua "sanpau" kisɨɨn ia, patiʔɨnɨʔɨnɨɨn ʦu "ienʦumin" kisɨɨn. sua sipataŋanai isi ia, kaʔanɨ ʦu makai miana, ʔuna tiʔiŋi ʔesi masiʦur~ɾuʔu ʔimiin. par~ɾasur~ɾuʦuɨn ʦu ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna ŋanai, "masiir~ɾar~ɾu ʦauin" sua ʔɨnai taiwan isi. muuʦir~ɾi kita nesi. soni, te kita musur~ɾuusur~ɾu kir~ɾaʦɨkɨɨʦɨkɨ. te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na kavaŋvaŋ ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ. ʔuna nipamuʦia, te kita maŋuʦunu navuŋu musuʔɨvɨ. niaʦaʔiva ʦu usɨɨpatɨ mɨna ʦenana isi. nimur~ɾuʔinasɨ kamu. koo kamu katɨtɨnɨn ar~ɾakukunuɨn. te ku taihiu sehu, mar~ɾaini misee kamua.
S.FORM: 'esi na niaca'iva cu mapusan urucin cenana taniara miaasua soni. niarisinata na sienfa sua "sanpau" kisʉʉn ia, pati'ʉnʉ'ʉnʉʉn cu "Iencumin" kisʉʉn. sua sipatanganai isi ia, ka'anʉ cu makai miana, 'una ti'ingi 'esi masicuru'u 'imiin. parasurucuʉn cu Cau Vuvurung tamna nganai, "masiiraru cauin" sua 'ʉnai Taiwan isi. muuciri kita nesi. soni, te kita musuruusuru kiracʉkʉʉcʉkʉ. te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na kavangvang Cau Vuvurung. 'una nipamucia, te kita mangucunu navungu musu'ʉvʉ. niaca'iva cu usʉʉpatʉ mʉna cenana isi. nimuru'inasʉ kamu. koo kamu katʉtʉnʉn arakukunuʉn. te ku taihiu sehu, maraini misee kamua.
S.PHON: ʔesi na niaʦaʔiva ʦu mapusan ur~ɾuʦin ʦenana taniar~ɾa miaasua soni. niar~ɾisinata na sienfa sua "sanpau" kisɨɨn ia, patiʔɨnɨʔɨnɨɨn ʦu "ienʦumin" kisɨɨn. sua sipataŋanai isi ia, kaʔanɨ ʦu makai miana, ʔuna tiʔiŋi ʔesi masiʦur~ɾuʔu ʔimiin. par~ɾasur~ɾuʦuɨn ʦu ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna ŋanai, "masiir~ɾar~ɾu ʦauin" sua ʔɨnai taiwan isi. muuʦir~ɾi kita nesi. soni, te kita musur~ɾuusur~ɾu kir~ɾaʦɨkɨɨʦɨkɨ. te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na kavaŋvaŋ ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ. ʔuna nipamuʦia, te kita maŋuʦunu navuŋu musuʔɨvɨ. niaʦaʔiva ʦu usɨɨpatɨ mɨna ʦenana isi. nimur~ɾuʔinasɨ kamu. koo kamu katɨtɨnɨn ar~ɾakukunuɨn. te ku taihiu sehu, mar~ɾaini misee kamua.
S.TRANSL: 二十二年前的今天，我們憲法 增修條文裡的「山胞」正式正 名為「原住民」。這個正名， 不僅去除了長期以來帶有歧視 的稱呼，更突顯了原住民族是 台灣「原來的主人」的地位。 站在這個基礎上，今天，我們 要更往前踏出一步。我要代表 政府，向全體原住民族，致上 我們最深的歉意。對於過去 四百年來，各位承受的苦痛和 不公平待遇，我代表政府，向 各位道歉。

On this day 22 years ago, the term "shanbao" (mountain people) in the Additional Articles of our Constitution was replaced with the proper name: "indigenous people". This correction not only did away with a discriminatory term, but also highlighted the status of indigenous peoples as Taiwan's "original owners". From this basis, today, we are taking another step forward. To all indigenous peoples of Taiwan: On behalf of the government, I express to you our deepest apology. For the four centuries of pain and mistreatment you have endured, I apologize to you on behalf of the government.

S.FORM: potucucuru ku. mataarava masini. 'esi na aracʉvʉrʉa mita namuriungu. 'una pa cau pacʉpʉngʉ, namune'i maraini misee. isi sua vanai maku, tia taihiu sehu maraini kamua misee. miana sua ka'anʉ katʉtʉnʉn. nukai, cau cucumeni tamna muru'inasʉ. 'una cau pacʉpʉngʉ, masiiraru tia makaasua misee. vanai kita tia muuciri nesi, te kita pati'ʉnʉ'ʉnaʉn cʉpʉngʉ makaasua.
S.PHON: potuʦuʦur~ɾu ku. mataar~ɾava masini. ʔesi na ar~ɾaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨa mita namur~ɾiuŋu. ʔuna pa ʦau paʦɨpɨŋɨ, namuneʔi mar~ɾaini misee. isi sua vanai maku, tia taihiu sehu mar~ɾaini kamua misee. miana sua kaʔanɨ katɨtɨnɨn. nukai, ʦau ʦuʦumeni tamna mur~ɾuʔinasɨ. ʔuna ʦau paʦɨpɨŋɨ, masiir~ɾar~ɾu tia makaasua misee. vanai kita tia muuʦir~ɾi nesi, te kita patiʔɨnɨʔɨnaɨn ʦɨpɨŋɨ makaasua.
S.FORM: potucucuru ku. mataarava masini. 'esi na aracʉvʉrʉa mita namuriungu. 'una pa cau pacʉpʉngʉ, namune'i maraini misee. isi sua vanai maku, tia taihiu sehu maraini kamua misee. miana sua ka'anʉ katʉtʉnʉn. nukai, cau cucumeni tamna muru'inasʉ. 'una cau pacʉpʉngʉ, masiiraru tia makaasua misee. vanai kita tia muuciri nesi, te kita pati'ʉnʉ'ʉnaʉn cʉpʉngʉ makaasua.
S.PHON: potuʦuʦur~ɾu ku. mataar~ɾava masini. ʔesi na ar~ɾaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨa mita namur~ɾiuŋu. ʔuna pa ʦau paʦɨpɨŋɨ, namuneʔi mar~ɾaini misee. isi sua vanai maku, tia taihiu sehu mar~ɾaini kamua misee. miana sua kaʔanɨ katɨtɨnɨn. nukai, ʦau ʦuʦumeni tamna mur~ɾuʔinasɨ. ʔuna ʦau paʦɨpɨŋɨ, masiir~ɾar~ɾu tia makaasua misee. vanai kita tia muuʦir~ɾi nesi, te kita patiʔɨnɨʔɨnaɨn ʦɨpɨŋɨ makaasua.
S.TRANSL: 我相信，一直到今天，在我們 生活周遭裡，還是有一些人認 為不需要道歉。而這個，就是 今天我需要代表政府道歉的最 重要原因。把過去的種種不公 平視為理所當然，或者，把過 去其他族群的苦痛，視為人類 發展的必然結果，這是我今天 站在這裡，企圖要改變和扭轉 的第一個觀念。

I know that even now, there are some around us who see no need to apologize. But that is the most important reason why I am representing the government to issue this apology today. To see what was unfair in the past as a matter of course, or to treat the pain of other ethnic peoples as an unavoidable part of human development, this is the first mindset that we, standing here today, resolve to change and overturn.

S.FORM: 'uruupaca kita ka'anʉ rangrang kari. tumatuuturu neni vanai tia maraini misee na Cau Vuvurung? 'ʉnai Taiwan isi. miaa niaca'iva cu usʉʉpata mʉna cenana, 'una cu cau monoon nesi cumacʉvʉrʉ. cau iisua, masiiraru 'esi takacicini cumacʉvʉrʉ. 'una takacicini tamna kari, uʉnhua, niurina, siacʉvʉrʉ 'acangʉ 'ʉnai. macuvungu, koo pa nguani pakiituru, 'una cau cucumeni iaavatu
S.PHON: ʔur~ɾuupaʦa kita kaʔanɨ r~ɾaŋr~ɾaŋ kar~ɾi. tumatuutur~ɾu neni vanai tia mar~ɾaini misee na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ? ʔɨnai taiwan isi. miaa niaʦaʔiva ʦu usɨɨpata mɨna ʦenana, ʔuna ʦu ʦau monoon nesi ʦumaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ. ʦau iisua, masiir~ɾar~ɾu ʔesi takaʦiʦini ʦumaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ. ʔuna takaʦiʦini tamna kar~ɾi, uɨnhua, niur~ɾina, siaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ ʔaʦaŋɨ ʔɨnai. maʦuvuŋu, koo pa ŋuani pakiitur~ɾu, ʔuna ʦau ʦuʦumeni iaavatu
S.FORM: 'uruupaca kita ka'anʉ rangrang kari. tumatuuturu neni vanai tia maraini misee na Cau Vuvurung? 'ʉnai Taiwan isi. miaa niaca'iva cu usʉʉpata mʉna cenana, 'una cu cau monoon nesi cumacʉvʉrʉ. cau iisua, masiiraru 'esi takacicini cumacʉvʉrʉ. 'una takacicini tamna kari, uʉnhua, niurina, siacʉvʉrʉ 'acangʉ 'ʉnai. macuvungu, koo pa nguani pakiituru, 'una cau cucumeni iaavatu
S.PHON: ʔur~ɾuupaʦa kita kaʔanɨ r~ɾaŋr~ɾaŋ kar~ɾi. tumatuutur~ɾu neni vanai tia mar~ɾaini misee na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ? ʔɨnai taiwan isi. miaa niaʦaʔiva ʦu usɨɨpata mɨna ʦenana, ʔuna ʦu ʦau monoon nesi ʦumaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ. ʦau iisua, masiir~ɾar~ɾu ʔesi takaʦiʦini ʦumaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ. ʔuna takaʦiʦini tamna kar~ɾi, uɨnhua, niur~ɾina, siaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ ʔaʦaŋɨ ʔɨnai. maʦuvuŋu, koo pa ŋuani pakiitur~ɾu, ʔuna ʦau ʦuʦumeni iaavatu
S.TRANSL: 讓我用很簡單的語言，來表達 為什麼要向原住民族道歉的原 因。台灣這塊土地，四百年前 早有人居住。這些人原本過著 自己的生活，有著自己的語言、 文化、習俗、生活領域。接著， 在未經他們同意之下，這塊土 地上來了另外一群人。

Let me put in simple terms why we are apologizing to the indigenous peoples. Four hundred years ago, there were already people living in Taiwan. These first inhabitants lived their lives and had their own languages, cultures, customs, and domains. But then, without their consent, another group of people arrived on these shores, and in the course of history, took everything from the first inhabitants who, on the land they have known most intimately, became displaced, foreign, non-mainstream, and marginalized.

S.FORM: na 'ʉnai isi. makaasua cu, sua marivivini iaavatu cau ia, makai tuiisua cu cauin 'ʉnai isi. sua masiiraru kasian cau ia, niara'akia cu to'unain. makai cu cau cucumeni, ka'anʉ cu ngaca'ʉ 'ʉnai, tuiisua kacikicikiringa cau. 'ʉna ucani tʉmʉkʉ cau. sua vanain aratatia ia, manasʉ niaranai cau cucumeni tamna muru'inasʉ. noo ka'aniin kita makasi, tia katʉtʉnʉ sua kuka. makai isi niaca'iva cu cau cumacʉvʉrʉ, te kita taramanʉngʉ, masicucuru vanain. makasua cu, sua sehu ia, tia vanai nipaicaa iisua. mangucunu pacʉpʉcʉpʉngʉ neni nipamucia. isi sua vanai maku tia muuciri nesi. 'una ucani sinatʉ "Taiwan tungsʉ" kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: na ʔɨnai isi. makaasua ʦu, sua mar~ɾivivini iaavatu ʦau ia, makai tuiisua ʦu ʦauin ʔɨnai isi. sua masiir~ɾar~ɾu kasian ʦau ia, niar~ɾaʔakia ʦu toʔunain. makai ʦu ʦau ʦuʦumeni, kaʔanɨ ʦu ŋaʦaʔɨ ʔɨnai, tuiisua kaʦikiʦikir~ɾiŋa ʦau. ʔɨna uʦani tɨmɨkɨ ʦau. sua vanain ar~ɾatatia ia, manasɨ niar~ɾanai ʦau ʦuʦumeni tamna mur~ɾuʔinasɨ. noo kaʔaniin kita makasi, tia katɨtɨnɨ sua kuka. makai isi niaʦaʔiva ʦu ʦau ʦumaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ, te kita tar~ɾamanɨŋɨ, masiʦuʦur~ɾu vanain. makasua ʦu, sua sehu ia, tia vanai nipaiʦaa iisua. maŋuʦunu paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋɨ neni nipamuʦia. isi sua vanai maku tia muuʦir~ɾi nesi. ʔuna uʦani sinatɨ "taiwan tuŋsɨ" kisɨɨn.
S.FORM: na 'ʉnai isi. makaasua cu, sua marivivini iaavatu cau ia, makai tuiisua cu cauin 'ʉnai isi. sua masiiraru kasian cau ia, niara'akia cu to'unain. makai cu cau cucumeni, ka'anʉ cu ngaca'ʉ 'ʉnai, tuiisua kacikicikiringa cau. 'ʉna ucani tʉmʉkʉ cau. sua vanain aratatia ia, manasʉ niaranai cau cucumeni tamna muru'inasʉ. noo ka'aniin kita makasi, tia katʉtʉnʉ sua kuka. makai isi niaca'iva cu cau cumacʉvʉrʉ, te kita taramanʉngʉ, masicucuru vanain. makasua cu, sua sehu ia, tia vanai nipaicaa iisua. mangucunu pacʉpʉcʉpʉngʉ neni nipamucia. isi sua vanai maku tia muuciri nesi. 'una ucani sinatʉ "Taiwan tungsʉ" kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: na ʔɨnai isi. makaasua ʦu, sua mar~ɾivivini iaavatu ʦau ia, makai tuiisua ʦu ʦauin ʔɨnai isi. sua masiir~ɾar~ɾu kasian ʦau ia, niar~ɾaʔakia ʦu toʔunain. makai ʦu ʦau ʦuʦumeni, kaʔanɨ ʦu ŋaʦaʔɨ ʔɨnai, tuiisua kaʦikiʦikir~ɾiŋa ʦau. ʔɨna uʦani tɨmɨkɨ ʦau. sua vanain ar~ɾatatia ia, manasɨ niar~ɾanai ʦau ʦuʦumeni tamna mur~ɾuʔinasɨ. noo kaʔaniin kita makasi, tia katɨtɨnɨ sua kuka. makai isi niaʦaʔiva ʦu ʦau ʦumaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ, te kita tar~ɾamanɨŋɨ, masiʦuʦur~ɾu vanain. makasua ʦu, sua sehu ia, tia vanai nipaiʦaa iisua. maŋuʦunu paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋɨ neni nipamuʦia. isi sua vanai maku tia muuʦir~ɾi nesi. ʔuna uʦani sinatɨ "taiwan tuŋsɨ" kisɨɨn.
S.TRANSL: 歷史的發展是，後來的這一 群人，剝奪了原先這一群人 的一切。讓他們在最熟悉的 土地上流離失所，成為異鄉 人，成為非主流，成為邊緣。一個族群的成功，很有可能 是建立在其他族群的苦難之 上。除非我們不宣稱自己是 一個公義的國家，否則這一 段歷史必須正視，真相必須 說出來。然後，最重要的， 政府必須為這段過去真誠反 省，這就是我今天站在這裡 的原因。

The success of one ethnic people can be built on the suffering of another. Unless we deny that we are a country of justice, we must face up to this history. We must tell the truth. And then, most importantly, the government must genuinely reflect on this past. This is why I stand here today.

S.FORM: sinatʉ iisua nguain tamna to'urua kari, 'una makasi, "aranai miana, 'akia niarisinata poiisua nipaicaa miana. cau Hʉran kani pananai, Cʉng sʉʉ kani mapurai, Cingtai kani niputukikio." masiiraru makaasia Nakasaiana tamna siacʉ'ʉraa. sua Cau Vucurung ia, miaa 'esi pa niaca'iva meetusa cenana miana, 'esi cu 'ʉnai isi. 'una cu macakuarʉ uʉnhua mataa macʉrang, 'apacuvungu nanamu. nakai 'apaica maa kita takacicini tamna siacʉ'ʉraa. marisinatʉ nipaicaa miana. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na Cau Vuvurung maraini misee.
S.PHON: sinatɨ iisua ŋuain tamna toʔur~ɾua kar~ɾi, ʔuna makasi, "ar~ɾanai miana, ʔakia niar~ɾisinata poiisua nipaiʦaa miana. ʦau hɨr~ɾan kani pananai, ʦɨŋ sɨɨ kani mapur~ɾai, ʦiŋtai kani niputukikio." masiir~ɾar~ɾu makaasia nakasaiana tamna siaʦɨʔɨr~ɾaa. sua ʦau vuʦur~ɾuŋ ia, miaa ʔesi pa niaʦaʔiva meetusa ʦenana miana, ʔesi ʦu ʔɨnai isi. ʔuna ʦu maʦakuar~ɾɨ uɨnhua mataa maʦɨr~ɾaŋ, ʔapaʦuvuŋu nanamu. nakai ʔapaiʦa maa kita takaʦiʦini tamna siaʦɨʔɨr~ɾaa. mar~ɾisinatɨ nipaiʦaa miana. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ mar~ɾaini misee.
S.FORM: sinatʉ iisua nguain tamna to'urua kari, 'una makasi, "aranai miana, 'akia niarisinata poiisua nipaicaa miana. cau Hʉran kani pananai, Cʉng sʉʉ kani mapurai, Cingtai kani niputukikio." masiiraru makaasia Nakasaiana tamna siacʉ'ʉraa. sua Cau Vucurung ia, miaa 'esi pa niaca'iva meetusa cenana miana, 'esi cu 'ʉnai isi. 'una cu macakuarʉ uʉnhua mataa macʉrang, 'apacuvungu nanamu. nakai 'apaica maa kita takacicini tamna siacʉ'ʉraa. marisinatʉ nipaicaa miana. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na Cau Vuvurung maraini misee.
S.PHON: sinatɨ iisua ŋuain tamna toʔur~ɾua kar~ɾi, ʔuna makasi, "ar~ɾanai miana, ʔakia niar~ɾisinata poiisua nipaiʦaa miana. ʦau hɨr~ɾan kani pananai, ʦɨŋ sɨɨ kani mapur~ɾai, ʦiŋtai kani niputukikio." masiir~ɾar~ɾu makaasia nakasaiana tamna siaʦɨʔɨr~ɾaa. sua ʦau vuʦur~ɾuŋ ia, miaa ʔesi pa niaʦaʔiva meetusa ʦenana miana, ʔesi ʦu ʔɨnai isi. ʔuna ʦu maʦakuar~ɾɨ uɨnhua mataa maʦɨr~ɾaŋ, ʔapaʦuvuŋu nanamu. nakai ʔapaiʦa maa kita takaʦiʦini tamna siaʦɨʔɨr~ɾaa. mar~ɾisinatɨ nipaiʦaa miana. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ mar~ɾaini misee.
S.TRANSL: 有一本書叫做「台灣通史」。 它的序言的第一段提到:「台 灣固無史也。荷人啟之，鄭 氏作之，清代營之。」。這 就是典型的漢人史觀。原住 民族，早在幾千年前，就在 這塊土地上，有豐富的文化 和智慧，代代相傳。不過， 我們只會用強勢族群的角度 來書寫歷史，為此，我代表 政府向原住民族道歉。

There is a book called "The General History of Taiwan" published in 1920. In its foreword are these words: "Taiwan had no history. The Dutch pioneered it, the Koxinga Kingdom built it, and the Qing Empire managed it." This is a typical Han view of history. The truth is that indigenous peoples have been here for thousands of years, with rich culture and wisdom that have been passed down through generations. But we only know to write history from the perspective of the dominant. For this, I apologize to the indigenous peoples on behalf of the government.

S.FORM: Hʉran mataa Cʉng cʉng kung tamna sehu. nimiapacai 'Oria mataa marisuacʉ nupasʉ. miaa Cingcau citai, paira 'una tatia musucara'ʉ macangini. miaa Ripuun citai, musikarʉ na to'unaa Cau Vuvurung 'uma'atipi. mataarava cu Minkuo tamna sehu. tia kani 'apatʉnʉn mataa namanamarʉ siacʉvʉrʉ. makaasua usʉʉpatʉ mʉna cenana. kavangvang sua niivatu na Taiwan sehu. 'uruupaca nantu macangini, marisuacʉ 'ʉnai. miakaka Cau Vuvurung tamna kenri. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na Cau Vuvurung maraini misee.
S.PHON: hɨr~ɾan mataa ʦɨŋ ʦɨŋ kuŋ tamna sehu. nimiapaʦai ʔor~ɾia mataa mar~ɾisuaʦɨ nupasɨ. miaa ʦiŋʦau ʦitai, pair~ɾa ʔuna tatia musuʦar~ɾaʔɨ maʦaŋini. miaa r~ɾipuun ʦitai, musikar~ɾɨ na toʔunaa ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ ʔumaʔatipi. mataar~ɾava ʦu minkuo tamna sehu. tia kani ʔapatɨnɨn mataa namanamar~ɾɨ siaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ. makaasua usɨɨpatɨ mɨna ʦenana. kavaŋvaŋ sua niivatu na taiwan sehu. ʔur~ɾuupaʦa nantu maʦaŋini, mar~ɾisuaʦɨ ʔɨnai. miakaka ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna kenr~ɾi. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ mar~ɾaini misee.
S.FORM: Hʉran mataa Cʉng cʉng kung tamna sehu. nimiapacai 'Oria mataa marisuacʉ nupasʉ. miaa Cingcau citai, paira 'una tatia musucara'ʉ macangini. miaa Ripuun citai, musikarʉ na to'unaa Cau Vuvurung 'uma'atipi. mataarava cu Minkuo tamna sehu. tia kani 'apatʉnʉn mataa namanamarʉ siacʉvʉrʉ. makaasua usʉʉpatʉ mʉna cenana. kavangvang sua niivatu na Taiwan sehu. 'uruupaca nantu macangini, marisuacʉ 'ʉnai. miakaka Cau Vuvurung tamna kenri. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na Cau Vuvurung maraini misee.
S.PHON: hɨr~ɾan mataa ʦɨŋ ʦɨŋ kuŋ tamna sehu. nimiapaʦai ʔor~ɾia mataa mar~ɾisuaʦɨ nupasɨ. miaa ʦiŋʦau ʦitai, pair~ɾa ʔuna tatia musuʦar~ɾaʔɨ maʦaŋini. miaa r~ɾipuun ʦitai, musikar~ɾɨ na toʔunaa ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ ʔumaʔatipi. mataar~ɾava ʦu minkuo tamna sehu. tia kani ʔapatɨnɨn mataa namanamar~ɾɨ siaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ. makaasua usɨɨpatɨ mɨna ʦenana. kavaŋvaŋ sua niivatu na taiwan sehu. ʔur~ɾuupaʦa nantu maʦaŋini, mar~ɾisuaʦɨ ʔɨnai. miakaka ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna kenr~ɾi. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ mar~ɾaini misee.
S.TRANSL: 荷蘭及鄭成功政權對平埔族群 的屠殺和經濟剝削，清朝時代 重大的流血衝突及鎮壓，日本 統治時期全面而深入的理番政 策，一直到戰後中華民國政府 施行的山地平地化政策。四百 年來，每一個曾經來到台灣的 政權，透過武力征伐、土地掠 奪，強烈侵害了原住民族既有 的權利。為此，我代表政府向 原住民族道歉。

The Dutch and the Koxinga Kingdom massacred and exploited the Pingpu ethnic group. The Qing Empire presided over bloody confrontations and suppression. Colonial Japan put in place comprehensive savage policies. And the post- war ROC government undertook assimilation policies. For 400 years, every regime that has come to Taiwan has brutally violated the rights of indigenous peoples through armed invasion and land seizure. For this, I apologize to the indigenous peoples on behalf of the government.

S.FORM: 'uruupaca niurina Cau Vuvurung matimanʉngʉ tanasʉn.'uruupaca kangvang niurina macʉrang matimanʉngʉ kurakurapʉ. nakai, miaa tuiisua masini tamna kuka. niara'akia Cau Vuvurung masiiraru tia takacicini tamna kenri. nimitʉrʉ aranai miana cupuungana tanasnʉ. ka'anʉ potucucuruʉn nguani tamna kenri. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na Cau Vuvurung musu'ʉvʉ maraini misee.
S.PHON: ʔur~ɾuupaʦa niur~ɾina ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ matimanɨŋɨ tanasɨn.ʔur~ɾuupaʦa kaŋvaŋ niur~ɾina maʦɨr~ɾaŋ matimanɨŋɨ kur~ɾakur~ɾapɨ. nakai, miaa tuiisua masini tamna kuka. niar~ɾaʔakia ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ masiir~ɾar~ɾu tia takaʦiʦini tamna kenr~ɾi. nimitɨr~ɾɨ ar~ɾanai miana ʦupuuŋana tanasnɨ. kaʔanɨ potuʦuʦur~ɾuɨn ŋuani tamna kenr~ɾi. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾaini misee.
S.FORM: 'uruupaca niurina Cau Vuvurung matimanʉngʉ tanasʉn.'uruupaca kangvang niurina macʉrang matimanʉngʉ kurakurapʉ. nakai, miaa tuiisua masini tamna kuka. niara'akia Cau Vuvurung masiiraru tia takacicini tamna kenri. nimitʉrʉ aranai miana cupuungana tanasnʉ. ka'anʉ potucucuruʉn nguani tamna kenri. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na Cau Vuvurung musu'ʉvʉ maraini misee.
S.PHON: ʔur~ɾuupaʦa niur~ɾina ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ matimanɨŋɨ tanasɨn.ʔur~ɾuupaʦa kaŋvaŋ niur~ɾina maʦɨr~ɾaŋ matimanɨŋɨ kur~ɾakur~ɾapɨ. nakai, miaa tuiisua masini tamna kuka. niar~ɾaʔakia ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ masiir~ɾar~ɾu tia takaʦiʦini tamna kenr~ɾi. nimitɨr~ɾɨ ar~ɾanai miana ʦupuuŋana tanasnɨ. kaʔanɨ potuʦuʦur~ɾuɨn ŋuani tamna kenr~ɾi. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾaini misee.
S.TRANSL: 原住民族依傳統慣習維繫部落 的秩序，並以傳統智慧維繫生 態的平衡。但是，在現代國家 體制建立的過程中，原住民族 對自身事務失去自決、自治的 權利。傳統社會組織瓦解，民 族集體權利也不被承認。為 此，我代表政府向原住民族道 歉。

Indigenous peoples maintain tribal order according to traditional customs, and ecological balance according to traditional wisdom. But in the process of modern state-building, indigenous peoples lost the right to steer their own course and govern their own affairs. The fabric of traditional societies was torn apart, and the collective rights of peoples were not recognized. For this, I apologize to the indigenous peoples on behalf of the government.

S.FORM: masiiraru 'una Cau Vuvurung tamna kari. nakai aranai miaa Ripuun citai, mataarava 1945 cenana. 'atipin sehu, aka kani 'uruupaca takacicini tamna kari. makasua cu, te cu muruvangvang ma'acunu kari Cau Vuvurung. 'akia cu kavangvang 'Oria tamna kari. maka'ʉna'ʉna sehu, ka'anʉ kipaatʉsʉ maritakarʉ Cau Vuvurung tamna uʉnhua. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na Cau Vuvurung musu'ʉvʉ maraini misee.
S.PHON: masiir~ɾar~ɾu ʔuna ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna kar~ɾi. nakai ar~ɾanai miaa r~ɾipuun ʦitai, mataar~ɾava **** ʦenana. ʔatipin sehu, aka kani ʔur~ɾuupaʦa takaʦiʦini tamna kar~ɾi. makasua ʦu, te ʦu mur~ɾuvaŋvaŋ maʔaʦunu kar~ɾi ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ. ʔakia ʦu kavaŋvaŋ ʔor~ɾia tamna kar~ɾi. makaʔɨnaʔɨna sehu, kaʔanɨ kipaatɨsɨ mar~ɾitakar~ɾɨ ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna uɨnhua. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾaini misee.
S.FORM: masiiraru 'una Cau Vuvurung tamna kari. nakai aranai miaa Ripuun citai, mataarava 1945 cenana. 'atipin sehu, aka kani 'uruupaca takacicini tamna kari. makasua cu, te cu muruvangvang ma'acunu kari Cau Vuvurung. 'akia cu kavangvang 'Oria tamna kari. maka'ʉna'ʉna sehu, ka'anʉ kipaatʉsʉ maritakarʉ Cau Vuvurung tamna uʉnhua. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na Cau Vuvurung musu'ʉvʉ maraini misee.
S.PHON: masiir~ɾar~ɾu ʔuna ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna kar~ɾi. nakai ar~ɾanai miaa r~ɾipuun ʦitai, mataar~ɾava **** ʦenana. ʔatipin sehu, aka kani ʔur~ɾuupaʦa takaʦiʦini tamna kar~ɾi. makasua ʦu, te ʦu mur~ɾuvaŋvaŋ maʔaʦunu kar~ɾi ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ. ʔakia ʦu kavaŋvaŋ ʔor~ɾia tamna kar~ɾi. makaʔɨnaʔɨna sehu, kaʔanɨ kipaatɨsɨ mar~ɾitakar~ɾɨ ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna uɨnhua. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾaini misee.
S.TRANSL: 原住民族本來有他們的母 語，歷經日本時代的同化 和皇民化政策，以及 1945 年之後，政府禁止說族語， 導致原住民族語言嚴重流 失。絕大多數的平埔族語 言已經消失。歷來的政府， 對原住民族傳統文化的維 護不夠積極，為此，我代 表政府向原住民族道歉。

Indigenous peoples had their own languages. However, with Japanese rule aiming to assimilate and turn all into imperial subjects, and with the ROC government banning tribal languages after 1945, indigenous peoples' languages suffered great losses. Most Pingpu languages have disappeared. Successive governments have been negligent in the protection of indigenous cultures. For this, I apologize to the indigenous peoples on behalf of the government.

S.FORM: cenana meesua. ka'anʉ tavara'ʉ cau Iami. musakasakau uvʉngʉn 'inia hʉferiau. miakaka tina'an cau ka'inia. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na Iami, musu'ʉvʉ marai misee. sua niaranai 'ʉnai cucumeni musikarʉ na Taiwan, nguai sua monoon na sipu 'Oria. nimu'uruu'uru ara'akia cu nguani tamna nganai. vanai isi, te ku masiikusa na 'Oria, musu'ʉvʉ maraini misee.
S.PHON: ʦenana meesua. kaʔanɨ tavar~ɾaʔɨ ʦau iami. musakasakau uvɨŋɨn ʔinia hɨfer~ɾiau. miakaka tinaʔan ʦau kaʔinia. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na iami, musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾai misee. sua niar~ɾanai ʔɨnai ʦuʦumeni musikar~ɾɨ na taiwan, ŋuai sua monoon na sipu ʔor~ɾia. nimuʔur~ɾuuʔur~ɾu ar~ɾaʔakia ʦu ŋuani tamna ŋanai. vanai isi, te ku masiikusa na ʔor~ɾia, musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾaini misee.
S.FORM: cenana meesua. ka'anʉ tavara'ʉ cau Iami. musakasakau uvʉngʉn 'inia hʉferiau. miakaka tina'an cau ka'inia. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na Iami, musu'ʉvʉ marai misee. sua niaranai 'ʉnai cucumeni musikarʉ na Taiwan, nguai sua monoon na sipu 'Oria. nimu'uruu'uru ara'akia cu nguani tamna nganai. vanai isi, te ku masiikusa na 'Oria, musu'ʉvʉ maraini misee.
S.PHON: ʦenana meesua. kaʔanɨ tavar~ɾaʔɨ ʦau iami. musakasakau uvɨŋɨn ʔinia hɨfer~ɾiau. miakaka tinaʔan ʦau kaʔinia. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na iami, musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾai misee. sua niar~ɾanai ʔɨnai ʦuʦumeni musikar~ɾɨ na taiwan, ŋuai sua monoon na sipu ʔor~ɾia. nimuʔur~ɾuuʔur~ɾu ar~ɾaʔakia ʦu ŋuani tamna ŋanai. vanai isi, te ku masiikusa na ʔor~ɾia, musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾaini misee.
S.TRANSL: 當年，政府在雅美族人 不知情的情況下，將核 廢料存置在蘭嶼。蘭嶼 的族人承受核廢料的傷 害。為此，我要代表政 府向雅美族人道歉。自外來者進入台灣以 來，居住在西部平原的 平埔族群首當其衝。歷 來統治者消除平埔族群 個人及民族身分，為此， 我代表政府，向平埔族 群道歉。

Without the knowledge of the Yami tribe, the government stored nuclear waste on Orchid Island. Tribe members on the island had to suffer the negative consequences. For this, I apologize to the Yami people on behalf of the government. Ever since outsiders began arriving in Taiwan, the Pingpu ethnic group on the western plains have born the brunt of the impact. One ruling power after another eroded the individual and collective identities of the Pingpu ethnic group. For this, I apologize to the Pingpu ethnic group on behalf of the government.

S.FORM: musuruusuru cu mincu. arivariʉn sehu Cau Vuvurung tamna niarisusunaa. 'una sehu tamna nipakiturua, 'una nikipatʉsaa. soni, 'una cu kita "Iencu mincu cipʉnfa". nakai horecu isi, ka'anʉ kasakʉnʉʉn sehu. ka'anʉ kita mara'an putukikio, ka'anʉ marivangvang, ka'anʉ maningcau curu. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na Cau Vuvurung musu'ʉvʉ maraini misee.
S.PHON: musur~ɾuusur~ɾu ʦu minʦu. ar~ɾivar~ɾiɨn sehu ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna niar~ɾisusunaa. ʔuna sehu tamna nipakitur~ɾua, ʔuna nikipatɨsaa. soni, ʔuna ʦu kita "ienʦu minʦu ʦipɨnfa". nakai hor~ɾeʦu isi, kaʔanɨ kasakɨnɨɨn sehu. kaʔanɨ kita mar~ɾaʔan putukikio, kaʔanɨ mar~ɾivaŋvaŋ, kaʔanɨ maniŋʦau ʦur~ɾu. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾaini misee.
S.FORM: musuruusuru cu mincu. arivariʉn sehu Cau Vuvurung tamna niarisusunaa. 'una sehu tamna nipakiturua, 'una nikipatʉsaa. soni, 'una cu kita "Iencu mincu cipʉnfa". nakai horecu isi, ka'anʉ kasakʉnʉʉn sehu. ka'anʉ kita mara'an putukikio, ka'anʉ marivangvang, ka'anʉ maningcau curu. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na Cau Vuvurung musu'ʉvʉ maraini misee.
S.PHON: musur~ɾuusur~ɾu ʦu minʦu. ar~ɾivar~ɾiɨn sehu ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna niar~ɾisusunaa. ʔuna sehu tamna nipakitur~ɾua, ʔuna nikipatɨsaa. soni, ʔuna ʦu kita "ienʦu minʦu ʦipɨnfa". nakai hor~ɾeʦu isi, kaʔanɨ kasakɨnɨɨn sehu. kaʔanɨ kita mar~ɾaʔan putukikio, kaʔanɨ mar~ɾivaŋvaŋ, kaʔanɨ maniŋʦau ʦur~ɾu. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾaini misee.
S.TRANSL: 民主轉型後，國家曾經回應原住民 族運動的訴求。政府做過一些承諾、 也做過一些努力。我們有相當進步 的「原住民族基本法」，不過，這 部法律，並沒有獲得政府機關的普 遍重視。我們做得不夠快、不夠全 面、不夠完善。為此，我要代表政 府，向原住民族道歉。

After the democratic transition, the country began to respond to the appeals of indigenous movements. The government made certain promises and efforts. Today, we have an Indigenous Peoples Basic Law that is quite advanced. However, government agencies have not given sufficient weight to this law. Our actions have not been fast enough, comprehensive enough or sound enough. For this, I apologize to the indigenous peoples on behalf of the government.

S.FORM: makasi kita "tuoyen uʉnhua" kani sua Taiwan. nakai, mataarava masini. Cau Vuvurung tamna tina'an, kiatuuturu, siacʉvʉrʉ nupasʉ, marivivini pa na ka'anʉ Cau Vuvurung. 'una pa, koo pa tarasangai taranʉkʉpai, mataa taracuru'uʉn na Cau Vuvurung. ka'anʉ pa musutanpʉ niputukikioa sehu. muru'inasʉ mataa masange cu Cau Vuvurung tamna cʉpʉngʉ. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na Cau Vuvurung musu'ʉvʉ maraini misee.
S.PHON: makasi kita "tuojen uɨnhua" kani sua taiwan. nakai, mataar~ɾava masini. ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna tinaʔan, kiatuutur~ɾu, siaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ nupasɨ, mar~ɾivivini pa na kaʔanɨ ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ. ʔuna pa, koo pa tar~ɾasaŋai tar~ɾanɨkɨpai, mataa tar~ɾaʦur~ɾuʔuɨn na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ. kaʔanɨ pa musutanpɨ niputukikioa sehu. mur~ɾuʔinasɨ mataa masaŋe ʦu ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna ʦɨpɨŋɨ. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾaini misee.
S.FORM: makasi kita "tuoyen uʉnhua" kani sua Taiwan. nakai, mataarava masini. Cau Vuvurung tamna tina'an, kiatuuturu, siacʉvʉrʉ nupasʉ, marivivini pa na ka'anʉ Cau Vuvurung. 'una pa, koo pa tarasangai taranʉkʉpai, mataa taracuru'uʉn na Cau Vuvurung. ka'anʉ pa musutanpʉ niputukikioa sehu. muru'inasʉ mataa masange cu Cau Vuvurung tamna cʉpʉngʉ. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na Cau Vuvurung musu'ʉvʉ maraini misee.
S.PHON: makasi kita "tuojen uɨnhua" kani sua taiwan. nakai, mataar~ɾava masini. ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna tinaʔan, kiatuutur~ɾu, siaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ nupasɨ, mar~ɾivivini pa na kaʔanɨ ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ. ʔuna pa, koo pa tar~ɾasaŋai tar~ɾanɨkɨpai, mataa tar~ɾaʦur~ɾuʔuɨn na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ. kaʔanɨ pa musutanpɨ niputukikioa sehu. mur~ɾuʔinasɨ mataa masaŋe ʦu ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna ʦɨpɨŋɨ. vanai isi, te ku taihiu sehu, masiikusa na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾaini misee.
S.TRANSL: 台灣號稱「多元文化」的社會。但 是，一直到今天，原住民族在健康、 教育、經濟生活、政治參與等許多 層面的指標，仍然跟非原住民存在 著落差。同時，對原住民族的刻板 印象、甚至是歧視，仍然沒有消失。 政府做得不夠多，讓原住民族承受 了一些其他族群沒有經歷過、感受 過的痛苦和挫折。為此，我要代表 政府，向原住民族道歉。

Taiwan is known as a culturally diverse society. But even today, indicators on health, education, economic livelihood, political participation and more still show gaps between indigenous and non- indigenous peoples. Meanwhile, stereotypes and even discrimination against indigenous peoples have not gone away. The government has not done enough, so indigenous peoples have suffered pain and frustration unknown to other ethnic peoples. For this, I apologize to the indigenous peoples on behalf of the government.

S.FORM: ka'anʉ musutanpʉ nikipatʉsaa mita. mkaasua namunamu cu, koo makacang mati'ʉnʉʉ'ʉna. muru'inasʉ iisua, 'esi pa 'inia mataarava masini. cucuru maraini! soni musu'ʉvʉ maraini misee. manasʉ nimaca'ivi cu miaranau takananga. nakai, sua iai ia, te cu pananai arakaranana. ka'anʉ ku pacʉpʉngʉ, usʉʉpatʉ mʉna cu cenana. niru'inasaa Cau Vuvurung, tia vanai ucani sinatʉ, ucani maraini misee kari, tavara'ʉ cu ara'akia. nakai, 'una cʉpʉngʉ maku. kamʉcʉ sua maraini misee soni, tavara'ʉ cucuru pakamamanʉng kitana kavangvang.
S.PHON: kaʔanɨ musutanpɨ nikipatɨsaa mita. mkaasua namunamu ʦu, koo makaʦaŋ matiʔɨnɨɨʔɨna. mur~ɾuʔinasɨ iisua, ʔesi pa ʔinia mataar~ɾava masini. ʦuʦur~ɾu mar~ɾaini! soni musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾaini misee. manasɨ nimaʦaʔivi ʦu miar~ɾanau takanaŋa. nakai, sua iai ia, te ʦu pananai ar~ɾakar~ɾanana. kaʔanɨ ku paʦɨpɨŋɨ, usɨɨpatɨ mɨna ʦu ʦenana. nir~ɾuʔinasaa ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ, tia vanai uʦani sinatɨ, uʦani mar~ɾaini misee kar~ɾi, tavar~ɾaʔɨ ʦu ar~ɾaʔakia. nakai, ʔuna ʦɨpɨŋɨ maku. kamɨʦɨ sua mar~ɾaini misee soni, tavar~ɾaʔɨ ʦuʦur~ɾu pakamamanɨŋ kitana kavaŋvaŋ.
S.FORM: ka'anʉ musutanpʉ nikipatʉsaa mita. mkaasua namunamu cu, koo makacang mati'ʉnʉʉ'ʉna. muru'inasʉ iisua, 'esi pa 'inia mataarava masini. cucuru maraini! soni musu'ʉvʉ maraini misee. manasʉ nimaca'ivi cu miaranau takananga. nakai, sua iai ia, te cu pananai arakaranana. ka'anʉ ku pacʉpʉngʉ, usʉʉpatʉ mʉna cu cenana. niru'inasaa Cau Vuvurung, tia vanai ucani sinatʉ, ucani maraini misee kari, tavara'ʉ cu ara'akia. nakai, 'una cʉpʉngʉ maku. kamʉcʉ sua maraini misee soni, tavara'ʉ cucuru pakamamanʉng kitana kavangvang.
S.PHON: kaʔanɨ musutanpɨ nikipatɨsaa mita. mkaasua namunamu ʦu, koo makaʦaŋ matiʔɨnɨɨʔɨna. mur~ɾuʔinasɨ iisua, ʔesi pa ʔinia mataar~ɾava masini. ʦuʦur~ɾu mar~ɾaini! soni musuʔɨvɨ mar~ɾaini misee. manasɨ nimaʦaʔivi ʦu miar~ɾanau takanaŋa. nakai, sua iai ia, te ʦu pananai ar~ɾakar~ɾanana. kaʔanɨ ku paʦɨpɨŋɨ, usɨɨpatɨ mɨna ʦu ʦenana. nir~ɾuʔinasaa ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ, tia vanai uʦani sinatɨ, uʦani mar~ɾaini misee kar~ɾi, tavar~ɾaʔɨ ʦu ar~ɾaʔakia. nakai, ʔuna ʦɨpɨŋɨ maku. kamɨʦɨ sua mar~ɾaini misee soni, tavar~ɾaʔɨ ʦuʦur~ɾu pakamamanɨŋ kitana kavaŋvaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我們不夠努力，而且世世代代， 都未能及早發現我們不夠努 力，才會讓各位身上的苦，一 直持續到今天。真的很抱歉。今天的道歉，雖然遲到了非 常久，卻是一個開始。我不 期望四百年來原住民族承受 的苦難傷害，會只因為一篇 文稿、一句道歉而弭平。但 是，我由衷地期待，今天的 道歉，是這個國家內部所有 人邁向和解的開始。

Our efforts have fallen short, and succeeding generations have been blind to this inadequacy. Because of this, your hardship has continued to this day. For this we are truly sorry. Today's apology is long overdue, but it is a beginning. I do not expect any one speech or phrase of apology to wipe away four centuries of pain and suffering by the indigenous peoples. But I do hope with all my heart that today's apology will set this country and all its people on the path towards reconciliation.

S.FORM: te ku 'uruupaca Cau Vuvurung tamna macʉrang. tumatuuturu neni vanai kita soni tia arakukunu. 'una Tayaru tamna kari, sua "cʉnsiang" ia, "Balay" kisʉʉn. sua "hʉcie" ia, "Sbalay" kisʉʉn. tia pu'uru'uruʉn "S" misee, pokariikari cu "Balay". kariin sua "cʉnsiang mataa hʉcie" ia, 'apacuvungu cʉpʉngʉ iisua. iimua, sua cucuru tia 'arupamanʉngʉ ia, tia 'apaica marivuarʉ cucuru nipaicaa. makausin ia, manasʉ te cu 'una ramangʉ makacʉkʉna.
S.PHON: te ku ʔur~ɾuupaʦa ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna maʦɨr~ɾaŋ. tumatuutur~ɾu neni vanai kita soni tia ar~ɾakukunu. ʔuna tajar~ɾu tamna kar~ɾi, sua "ʦɨnsiaŋ" ia, "*a*aj" kisɨɨn. sua "hɨʦie" ia, "s*a*aj" kisɨɨn. tia puʔur~ɾuʔur~ɾuɨn "s" misee, pokar~ɾiikar~ɾi ʦu "*a*aj". kar~ɾiin sua "ʦɨnsiaŋ mataa hɨʦie" ia, ʔapaʦuvuŋu ʦɨpɨŋɨ iisua. iimua, sua ʦuʦur~ɾu tia ʔar~ɾupamanɨŋɨ ia, tia ʔapaiʦa mar~ɾivuar~ɾɨ ʦuʦur~ɾu nipaiʦaa. makausin ia, manasɨ te ʦu ʔuna r~ɾamaŋɨ makaʦɨkɨna.
S.FORM: te ku 'uruupaca Cau Vuvurung tamna macʉrang. tumatuuturu neni vanai kita soni tia arakukunu. 'una Tayaru tamna kari, sua "cʉnsiang" ia, "Balay" kisʉʉn. sua "hʉcie" ia, "Sbalay" kisʉʉn. tia pu'uru'uruʉn "S" misee, pokariikari cu "Balay". kariin sua "cʉnsiang mataa hʉcie" ia, 'apacuvungu cʉpʉngʉ iisua. iimua, sua cucuru tia 'arupamanʉngʉ ia, tia 'apaica marivuarʉ cucuru nipaicaa. makausin ia, manasʉ te cu 'una ramangʉ makacʉkʉna.
S.PHON: te ku ʔur~ɾuupaʦa ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna maʦɨr~ɾaŋ. tumatuutur~ɾu neni vanai kita soni tia ar~ɾakukunu. ʔuna tajar~ɾu tamna kar~ɾi, sua "ʦɨnsiaŋ" ia, "*a*aj" kisɨɨn. sua "hɨʦie" ia, "s*a*aj" kisɨɨn. tia puʔur~ɾuʔur~ɾuɨn "s" misee, pokar~ɾiikar~ɾi ʦu "*a*aj". kar~ɾiin sua "ʦɨnsiaŋ mataa hɨʦie" ia, ʔapaʦuvuŋu ʦɨpɨŋɨ iisua. iimua, sua ʦuʦur~ɾu tia ʔar~ɾupamanɨŋɨ ia, tia ʔapaiʦa mar~ɾivuar~ɾɨ ʦuʦur~ɾu nipaiʦaa. makausin ia, manasɨ te ʦu ʔuna r~ɾamaŋɨ makaʦɨkɨna.
S.TRANSL: 請容我用一個原住民族的智 慧，來說明今天的場合。在泰 雅族的語言裡，「真相」， 叫做 Balay。而「和解」叫做 Sbalay，也就是在 Balay 之前 加一個 S 的音。真相與和解， 其實是兩個相關的概念。換句 話說，真正的和解，只有透過 誠懇面對真相，才有可能達成。

Please allow me to shed light on this occasion with a piece of indigenous wisdom. In the Atayal language, truth is called "Balay", and reconciliation is called "Sbalay", so you simply add an "S" sound to "Balay". Truth and reconciliation are in fact two related concepts. In other words, only by facing the truth sincerely can reconciliation be attained.

S.FORM: na Cau Vuvurung tamna uʉnhua. noo 'unain cau nipaamuci na cau cucumeni. 'unain cʉpʉngʉ tia 'arupamanʉngʉ. sua mamarurang ia, tia maricuvucuvungu nguani. noo matacuvucuvungu cu ia, ka'anʉ makacʉng maripipining kari maraini misee. mu'uruu'uru pa marivuvuarʉ takacicini tamna cʉpʉngʉ. marivivini 'apima cu 'inia mamarurang. sua niaca'iva cu ia maca'ivi cu. isi sua kisaa "Sbalay".
S.PHON: na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna uɨnhua. noo ʔunain ʦau nipaamuʦi na ʦau ʦuʦumeni. ʔunain ʦɨpɨŋɨ tia ʔar~ɾupamanɨŋɨ. sua mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ ia, tia mar~ɾiʦuvuʦuvuŋu ŋuani. noo mataʦuvuʦuvuŋu ʦu ia, kaʔanɨ makaʦɨŋ mar~ɾipipiniŋ kar~ɾi mar~ɾaini misee. muʔur~ɾuuʔur~ɾu pa mar~ɾivuvuar~ɾɨ takaʦiʦini tamna ʦɨpɨŋɨ. mar~ɾivivini ʔapima ʦu ʔinia mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ. sua niaʦaʔiva ʦu ia maʦaʔivi ʦu. isi sua kisaa "s*a*aj".
S.FORM: na Cau Vuvurung tamna uʉnhua. noo 'unain cau nipaamuci na cau cucumeni. 'unain cʉpʉngʉ tia 'arupamanʉngʉ. sua mamarurang ia, tia maricuvucuvungu nguani. noo matacuvucuvungu cu ia, ka'anʉ makacʉng maripipining kari maraini misee. mu'uruu'uru pa marivuvuarʉ takacicini tamna cʉpʉngʉ. marivivini 'apima cu 'inia mamarurang. sua niaca'iva cu ia maca'ivi cu. isi sua kisaa "Sbalay".
S.PHON: na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna uɨnhua. noo ʔunain ʦau nipaamuʦi na ʦau ʦuʦumeni. ʔunain ʦɨpɨŋɨ tia ʔar~ɾupamanɨŋɨ. sua mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ ia, tia mar~ɾiʦuvuʦuvuŋu ŋuani. noo mataʦuvuʦuvuŋu ʦu ia, kaʔanɨ makaʦɨŋ mar~ɾipipiniŋ kar~ɾi mar~ɾaini misee. muʔur~ɾuuʔur~ɾu pa mar~ɾivuvuar~ɾɨ takaʦiʦini tamna ʦɨpɨŋɨ. mar~ɾivivini ʔapima ʦu ʔinia mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ. sua niaʦaʔiva ʦu ia maʦaʔivi ʦu. isi sua kisaa "s*a*aj".
S.TRANSL: 在原住民族的文化裡，當 有人得罪了部落裡的其 他人，有意想要和解的時 候，長老會把加害者和被 害者，都聚在一起。聚在 一起，不是直接道歉，而 是每個人都坦誠地，講出 自己的心路歷程。這個說 出真相的過程結束之後， 長老會要大家一起喝一 杯，讓過去的，真的過去。 這就是 Sbalay。

In indigenous cultures, when a tribe member has offended another and intends to reconcile, an elder brings together the offender and the offended – not to produce a direct apology, but to allow each side to frankly share their inner journeys. When this truth-telling concludes, the elder calls for everyone to drink together, so that what is past is truly past. This is "Sbalay".

S.FORM: pacʉpʉngʉ ku, arakukunu kita soni. kamʉcʉ nguai sua sehu mataa Cau Vuvurung 'esi cucuru "Sbalay". sua niaca'iva cu nipamucia, nipaicaa miana, arivuvuarʉn maku pokariikari. nusoni, tangria mita Cau Vuvurung, tia maripipining kangvang kari. ka'anʉ ku tavara'ʉ makasi kamu, iurusoo ku misee. nakai te ku makasi kamua, usʉ'oo na tavaarunga sua kamʉcʉ tamna cʉpʉngʉ. sua nipamucia miana ia, ka'anʉ tia makaa'ʉna arapipining. kuka isi, tia 'una ucani taniara, cucuru masiikusa na 'arupamanʉngʉ cacanʉ.
S.PHON: paʦɨpɨŋɨ ku, ar~ɾakukunu kita soni. kamɨʦɨ ŋuai sua sehu mataa ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ ʔesi ʦuʦur~ɾu "s*a*aj". sua niaʦaʔiva ʦu nipamuʦia, nipaiʦaa miana, ar~ɾivuvuar~ɾɨn maku pokar~ɾiikar~ɾi. nusoni, taŋr~ɾia mita ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ, tia mar~ɾipipiniŋ kaŋvaŋ kar~ɾi. kaʔanɨ ku tavar~ɾaʔɨ makasi kamu, iur~ɾusoo ku misee. nakai te ku makasi kamua, usɨʔoo na tavaar~ɾuŋa sua kamɨʦɨ tamna ʦɨpɨŋɨ. sua nipamuʦia miana ia, kaʔanɨ tia makaaʔɨna ar~ɾapipiniŋ. kuka isi, tia ʔuna uʦani taniar~ɾa, ʦuʦur~ɾu masiikusa na ʔar~ɾupamanɨŋɨ ʦaʦanɨ.
S.FORM: pacʉpʉngʉ ku, arakukunu kita soni. kamʉcʉ nguai sua sehu mataa Cau Vuvurung 'esi cucuru "Sbalay". sua niaca'iva cu nipamucia, nipaicaa miana, arivuvuarʉn maku pokariikari. nusoni, tangria mita Cau Vuvurung, tia maripipining kangvang kari. ka'anʉ ku tavara'ʉ makasi kamu, iurusoo ku misee. nakai te ku makasi kamua, usʉ'oo na tavaarunga sua kamʉcʉ tamna cʉpʉngʉ. sua nipamucia miana ia, ka'anʉ tia makaa'ʉna arapipining. kuka isi, tia 'una ucani taniara, cucuru masiikusa na 'arupamanʉngʉ cacanʉ.
S.PHON: paʦɨpɨŋɨ ku, ar~ɾakukunu kita soni. kamɨʦɨ ŋuai sua sehu mataa ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ ʔesi ʦuʦur~ɾu "s*a*aj". sua niaʦaʔiva ʦu nipamuʦia, nipaiʦaa miana, ar~ɾivuvuar~ɾɨn maku pokar~ɾiikar~ɾi. nusoni, taŋr~ɾia mita ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ, tia mar~ɾipipiniŋ kaŋvaŋ kar~ɾi. kaʔanɨ ku tavar~ɾaʔɨ makasi kamu, iur~ɾusoo ku misee. nakai te ku makasi kamua, usɨʔoo na tavaar~ɾuŋa sua kamɨʦɨ tamna ʦɨpɨŋɨ. sua nipamuʦia miana ia, kaʔanɨ tia makaaʔɨna ar~ɾapipiniŋ. kuka isi, tia ʔuna uʦani taniar~ɾa, ʦuʦur~ɾu masiikusa na ʔar~ɾupamanɨŋɨ ʦaʦanɨ.
S.TRANSL: 我期待今天這個場合，就是 一個政府和原住民族之間的 Sbalay。我把過去的錯誤，過 去的真相，竭盡所能、毫無保 留地講出來。等一下，原住民 族的朋友，也會說出想法。我 不敢要求各位現在就原諒，但 是，我懇請大家保持希望，過 去的錯誤絕不會重複，這個國 家，有朝一日，可以真正走向 和解。

I hope today's occasion can be a "Sbalay" between the government and the indigenous peoples. I have spoken of past mistakes and truths the best I can, with nothing held back. In a moment, our indigenous friends will speak. I do not dare ask you to forgive, here and now. But I sincerely ask you to sustain the hope that past wrongs will not be repeated, and that one day, this country can see true reconciliation.

S.FORM: sua soni ia, 'esi pa maa tia pananai. tia kara cucuru 'arupamanʉngʉ, sehu sua tia cʉ'ʉraa. ka'anʉ Cau Vuvurung mataa 'Oria. tavara'ʉ ku, ka'anʉ musutanpʉ 'inmaamia ivici pokariikari. sua niputukikioa na Cau Vuvurung, iisua sua tia cucuru 'arupamʉnʉngʉ kuka isi.
S.PHON: sua soni ia, ʔesi pa maa tia pananai. tia kar~ɾa ʦuʦur~ɾu ʔar~ɾupamanɨŋɨ, sehu sua tia ʦɨʔɨr~ɾaa. kaʔanɨ ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ mataa ʔor~ɾia. tavar~ɾaʔɨ ku, kaʔanɨ musutanpɨ ʔinmaamia iviʦi pokar~ɾiikar~ɾi. sua niputukikioa na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ, iisua sua tia ʦuʦur~ɾu ʔar~ɾupamɨnɨŋɨ kuka isi.
S.FORM: sua soni ia, 'esi pa maa tia pananai. tia kara cucuru 'arupamanʉngʉ, sehu sua tia cʉ'ʉraa. ka'anʉ Cau Vuvurung mataa 'Oria. tavara'ʉ ku, ka'anʉ musutanpʉ 'inmaamia ivici pokariikari. sua niputukikioa na Cau Vuvurung, iisua sua tia cucuru 'arupamʉnʉngʉ kuka isi.
S.PHON: sua soni ia, ʔesi pa maa tia pananai. tia kar~ɾa ʦuʦur~ɾu ʔar~ɾupamanɨŋɨ, sehu sua tia ʦɨʔɨr~ɾaa. kaʔanɨ ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ mataa ʔor~ɾia. tavar~ɾaʔɨ ku, kaʔanɨ musutanpɨ ʔinmaamia iviʦi pokar~ɾiikar~ɾi. sua niputukikioa na ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ, iisua sua tia ʦuʦur~ɾu ʔar~ɾupamɨnɨŋɨ kuka isi.
S.TRANSL: 今天只是一個開始，會不會和解 的責任，不在原住民族及平埔族 群身上，而在政府身上。我知 道，光是口頭的道歉是不夠的， 政府從現在開始，為原住民族所 做的一切，將是這個國家是否真 正能夠和解的關鍵。

Today is only a beginning. The duty for reconciliation lies not with the indigenous peoples and the Pingpu ethnic group, but with the government. I know that words of apology alone are not enough. What we actually do for the indigenous peoples will decide whether reconciliation succeeds or stumbles.

S.FORM: te ku moon nesi marivuvuarʉ kari. na sikara Cungtung fu, tia 'apuciri "Iencu mincu risʉ cʉng'ii mataa risʉ cuansing cʉng'ii uiyenhui". te ku 'uruupaca Cungtung tamna nganai marivivici. makariikari mataa Cau Vuvurung tamna taihiu.kenkiu tia putukikioa kuka.
S.PHON: te ku moon nesi mar~ɾivuvuar~ɾɨ kar~ɾi. na sikar~ɾa ʦuŋtuŋ fu, tia ʔapuʦir~ɾi "ienʦu minʦu r~ɾisɨ ʦɨŋʔii mataa r~ɾisɨ ʦuansiŋ ʦɨŋʔii uijenhui". te ku ʔur~ɾuupaʦa ʦuŋtuŋ tamna ŋanai mar~ɾiviviʦi. makar~ɾiikar~ɾi mataa ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna taihiu.kenkiu tia putukikioa kuka.
S.FORM: te ku moon nesi marivuvuarʉ kari. na sikara Cungtung fu, tia 'apuciri "Iencu mincu risʉ cʉng'ii mataa risʉ cuansing cʉng'ii uiyenhui". te ku 'uruupaca Cungtung tamna nganai marivivici. makariikari mataa Cau Vuvurung tamna taihiu.kenkiu tia putukikioa kuka.
S.PHON: te ku moon nesi mar~ɾivuvuar~ɾɨ kar~ɾi. na sikar~ɾa ʦuŋtuŋ fu, tia ʔapuʦir~ɾi "ienʦu minʦu r~ɾisɨ ʦɨŋʔii mataa r~ɾisɨ ʦuansiŋ ʦɨŋʔii uijenhui". te ku ʔur~ɾuupaʦa ʦuŋtuŋ tamna ŋanai mar~ɾiviviʦi. makar~ɾiikar~ɾi mataa ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna taihiu.kenkiu tia putukikioa kuka.
S.TRANSL: 我要在此正式宣布，總統府將 設置「原住民族歷史正義與轉 型正義委員會」。我會以國家 元首的身分，親自擔任召集 人，與各族代表共同追求歷史 正義，也會對等地協商這個國 家往後的政策方向。

Therefore, I am here to announce that we are setting up an Indigenous Historical Justice and Transitional Justice Commission under the Presidential Office. As the head of state, I will serve as convener and work hand in hand with tribal representatives to pursue historical justice. We will also discuss, on the basis of equality, the future policy direction of this country.

S.FORM: te pa ku masii'ʉna. Cungtung fu tamna uiyenhui, tia tarasakʉnʉ 'esi kara katʉʉtʉa kuka mataa Cau Vuvurung. kavangvang sua tuiisua taihiu ia, tia 'apaica nimakariikari tanasʉn mapurai 'inia. nguani tia mavici cʉpʉngʉ cau, marivuvuarʉ na uiyenhui.
S.PHON: te pa ku masiiʔɨna. ʦuŋtuŋ fu tamna uijenhui, tia tar~ɾasakɨnɨ ʔesi kar~ɾa katɨɨtɨa kuka mataa ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ. kavaŋvaŋ sua tuiisua taihiu ia, tia ʔapaiʦa nimakar~ɾiikar~ɾi tanasɨn mapur~ɾai ʔinia. ŋuani tia maviʦi ʦɨpɨŋɨ ʦau, mar~ɾivuvuar~ɾɨ na uijenhui.
S.FORM: te pa ku masii'ʉna. Cungtung fu tamna uiyenhui, tia tarasakʉnʉ 'esi kara katʉʉtʉa kuka mataa Cau Vuvurung. kavangvang sua tuiisua taihiu ia, tia 'apaica nimakariikari tanasʉn mapurai 'inia. nguani tia mavici cʉpʉngʉ cau, marivuvuarʉ na uiyenhui.
S.PHON: te pa ku masiiʔɨna. ʦuŋtuŋ fu tamna uijenhui, tia tar~ɾasakɨnɨ ʔesi kar~ɾa katɨɨtɨa kuka mataa ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ. kavaŋvaŋ sua tuiisua taihiu ia, tia ʔapaiʦa nimakar~ɾiikar~ɾi tanasɨn mapur~ɾai ʔinia. ŋuani tia maviʦi ʦɨpɨŋɨ ʦau, mar~ɾivuvuar~ɾɨ na uijenhui.
S.TRANSL: 我要強調，總統府的委員會， 最高度重視的，是國家和原住 民族的對等關係。各族代表的 產生，包括平埔族群，都會以 民族和部落的共識為基礎。這 個機制，將會是一個原住民族 集體決策的機制，可以把族人 的心聲真正傳達出來。

I want to stress that this commission places the greatest importance on equality between the country and the indigenous peoples. The election of tribal representatives, including for the Pingpu ethnic group, will take as basis the consensus of peoples and tribes. This commission will serve as a mechanism for collective decision-making by indigenous peoples, and will ensure that the voices of tribe members find true expression.

S.FORM: 'una pa, te maku tuturuʉn Singcʉng ien. 'apaica taniara makariikari, mapurai poiisua "Iencu mincu cipʉn fa tuitung hui". sua nipukarikaria tia putukikioa ia, tia poon na Singcʉng ien marivuvuarʉ kari. sua tia pakarikaria ia, makai tikirimi nipaicaa miana cʉpʉngʉ. mapurai Iencu mincu cʉcʉʉ. poiisua cingcii tamna katʉʉtʉa musuruusuru. ciau'ii mataa uʉnhua tamna 'apacuvungu. tia makananu pakamʉnʉngʉ tina'an. mataa kanamarʉ Cau vuvurung tamna kenri.
S.PHON: ʔuna pa, te maku tutur~ɾuɨn siŋʦɨŋ ien. ʔapaiʦa taniar~ɾa makar~ɾiikar~ɾi, mapur~ɾai poiisua "ienʦu minʦu ʦipɨn fa tuituŋ hui". sua nipukar~ɾikar~ɾia tia putukikioa ia, tia poon na siŋʦɨŋ ien mar~ɾivuvuar~ɾɨ kar~ɾi. sua tia pakar~ɾikar~ɾia ia, makai tikir~ɾimi nipaiʦaa miana ʦɨpɨŋɨ. mapur~ɾai ienʦu minʦu ʦɨʦɨɨ. poiisua ʦiŋʦii tamna katɨɨtɨa musur~ɾuusur~ɾu. ʦiauʔii mataa uɨnhua tamna ʔapaʦuvuŋu. tia makananu pakamɨnɨŋɨ tinaʔan. mataa kanamar~ɾɨ ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna kenr~ɾi.
S.FORM: 'una pa, te maku tuturuʉn Singcʉng ien. 'apaica taniara makariikari, mapurai poiisua "Iencu mincu cipʉn fa tuitung hui". sua nipukarikaria tia putukikioa ia, tia poon na Singcʉng ien marivuvuarʉ kari. sua tia pakarikaria ia, makai tikirimi nipaicaa miana cʉpʉngʉ. mapurai Iencu mincu cʉcʉʉ. poiisua cingcii tamna katʉʉtʉa musuruusuru. ciau'ii mataa uʉnhua tamna 'apacuvungu. tia makananu pakamʉnʉngʉ tina'an. mataa kanamarʉ Cau vuvurung tamna kenri.
S.PHON: ʔuna pa, te maku tutur~ɾuɨn siŋʦɨŋ ien. ʔapaiʦa taniar~ɾa makar~ɾiikar~ɾi, mapur~ɾai poiisua "ienʦu minʦu ʦipɨn fa tuituŋ hui". sua nipukar~ɾikar~ɾia tia putukikioa ia, tia poon na siŋʦɨŋ ien mar~ɾivuvuar~ɾɨ kar~ɾi. sua tia pakar~ɾikar~ɾia ia, makai tikir~ɾimi nipaiʦaa miana ʦɨpɨŋɨ. mapur~ɾai ienʦu minʦu ʦɨʦɨɨ. poiisua ʦiŋʦii tamna katɨɨtɨa musur~ɾuusur~ɾu. ʦiauʔii mataa uɨnhua tamna ʔapaʦuvuŋu. tia makananu pakamɨnɨŋɨ tinaʔan. mataa kanamar~ɾɨ ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna kenr~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: 另外，我也會要求行政院定 期召開「原住民族基本法推 動會」。委員會中所形成的 政策共識，未來的政府，會 在院的層級，來協調及處理 相關事務。這些事務包括歷 史記憶的追尋、原住民族自 治的推動、經濟的公平發展、 教育與文化的傳承、健康的 保障，以及都市族人權益的 維護等等。

In addition, I will request that our Executive Yuan convene regularly the Indigenous Peoples Basic Law Promotion Committee, and use the Yuan's authority to coordinate and handle matters related to any consensus reached by the above-mentioned commission. These matters include the following: to retrieve historical memories, to promote indigenous self-government, to seek fair economic development, to ensure continuation of culture and education, to safeguard indigenous health, and to protect the rights of urban indigenous peoples, etc.

S.FORM: poiisua masini tamna horecu, mataa Cau Vuvurung tamna niurina uʉnhua. 'una cucuru ka'anʉ maatʉa. te kita 'apuciri "Iencu mincu farii fu'uu cungsin". tia pati'ʉnʉ'ʉnʉʉn sua ka'anʉ mamanʉng. masii horecu mataa niurina ia, ka'anʉ paira 'una 'apacangini.
S.PHON: poiisua masini tamna hor~ɾeʦu, mataa ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna niur~ɾina uɨnhua. ʔuna ʦuʦur~ɾu kaʔanɨ maatɨa. te kita ʔapuʦir~ɾi "ienʦu minʦu far~ɾii fuʔuu ʦuŋsin". tia patiʔɨnɨʔɨnɨɨn sua kaʔanɨ mamanɨŋ. masii hor~ɾeʦu mataa niur~ɾina ia, kaʔanɨ pair~ɾa ʔuna ʔapaʦaŋini.
S.FORM: poiisua masini tamna horecu, mataa Cau Vuvurung tamna niurina uʉnhua. 'una cucuru ka'anʉ maatʉa. te kita 'apuciri "Iencu mincu farii fu'uu cungsin". tia pati'ʉnʉ'ʉnʉʉn sua ka'anʉ mamanʉng. masii horecu mataa niurina ia, ka'anʉ paira 'una 'apacangini.
S.PHON: poiisua masini tamna hor~ɾeʦu, mataa ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna niur~ɾina uɨnhua. ʔuna ʦuʦur~ɾu kaʔanɨ maatɨa. te kita ʔapuʦir~ɾi "ienʦu minʦu far~ɾii fuʔuu ʦuŋsin". tia patiʔɨnɨʔɨnɨɨn sua kaʔanɨ mamanɨŋ. masii hor~ɾeʦu mataa niur~ɾina ia, kaʔanɨ pair~ɾa ʔuna ʔapaʦaŋini.
S.TRANSL: 對於現代法律與原住民族傳 統文化，有些格格不入的地 方，我們要建立具有文化敏 感度的「原住民族法律服務中 心」，透過制度化的設計，來 緩和原住民族傳統慣習和現 行國家法律規範之間，日益頻 繁的衝突。

Where modern laws and indigenous traditional cultures are at odds, we will set up an Indigenous Legal Service Center with a high degree of cultural sensitivity, to reduce through institutional design the growing clashes between indigenous customs and modern laws.

S.FORM: te maku tuturuʉn kʉkʉnang maku kumu'iing. tia tikirimiʉn vanai Cau Vuvurung tamna niurina. nimoon na niurina 'ʉani, sua ka'anʉ vanai tia mapu'a. niaracakʉnʉ ka'anʉ pau'i tamna marʉkurapʉ, nakai nipacuʉn horecu. makai makaasia, te kita kinkiu, tia pakʉnnanu masii aramamanʉng.
S.PHON: te maku tutur~ɾuɨn kɨkɨnaŋ maku kumuʔiiŋ. tia tikir~ɾimiɨn vanai ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna niur~ɾina. nimoon na niur~ɾina ʔɨani, sua kaʔanɨ vanai tia mapuʔa. niar~ɾaʦakɨnɨ kaʔanɨ pauʔi tamna mar~ɾɨkur~ɾapɨ, nakai nipaʦuɨn hor~ɾeʦu. makai makaasia, te kita kinkiu, tia pakɨnnanu masii ar~ɾamamanɨŋ.
S.FORM: te maku tuturuʉn kʉkʉnang maku kumu'iing. tia tikirimiʉn vanai Cau Vuvurung tamna niurina. nimoon na niurina 'ʉani, sua ka'anʉ vanai tia mapu'a. niaracakʉnʉ ka'anʉ pau'i tamna marʉkurapʉ, nakai nipacuʉn horecu. makai makaasia, te kita kinkiu, tia pakʉnnanu masii aramamanʉng.
S.PHON: te maku tutur~ɾuɨn kɨkɨnaŋ maku kumuʔiiŋ. tia tikir~ɾimiɨn vanai ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna niur~ɾina. nimoon na niur~ɾina ʔɨani, sua kaʔanɨ vanai tia mapuʔa. niar~ɾaʦakɨnɨ kaʔanɨ pauʔi tamna mar~ɾɨkur~ɾapɨ, nakai nipaʦuɨn hor~ɾeʦu. makai makaasia, te kita kinkiu, tia pakɨnnanu masii ar~ɾamamanɨŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我會要求相關部門，立刻著 手整理，原住民族因為傳統 習俗，在傳統領域內，基於 非交易的需要，狩獵非保育類 動物，而遭受起訴與判刑的案 例。針對這些案例，我們來研 議解決的方案。

I will ask the relevant agencies to immediately pull together cases in which indigenous community members have been indicted or sentenced for hunting, where the hunting was done in accordance with traditional customs, on traditional lands, and for non-transactional needs, and where the animals hunted were not protected by conservation laws. For such cases we will deliberate solutions.

S.FORM: te pa maku tuturuʉn kumu'iing. nimikiananu sua hʉferiau uvʉngʉn na Ranyi, tia arisinatʉn marivuvuarʉ na cau. noo ka'anʉ pa tavara'ʉn aravariʉn iisua hʉferiau, tia uranʉn pasacarapʉ cau Iami. maatʉa, tia putucauʉn 'Oria siacʉ'ʉra takacicini. na usia vuanʉ matuun taniara to'urua. tia kinsaʉn mati'ʉnʉʉ'ʉna horecu, 'apui'i 'Oria tamna masiiraru keri.
S.PHON: te pa maku tutur~ɾuɨn kumuʔiiŋ. nimikiananu sua hɨfer~ɾiau uvɨŋɨn na r~ɾanji, tia ar~ɾisinatɨn mar~ɾivuvuar~ɾɨ na ʦau. noo kaʔanɨ pa tavar~ɾaʔɨn ar~ɾavar~ɾiɨn iisua hɨfer~ɾiau, tia ur~ɾanɨn pasaʦar~ɾapɨ ʦau iami. maatɨa, tia putuʦauɨn ʔor~ɾia siaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa takaʦiʦini. na usia vuanɨ matuun taniar~ɾa toʔur~ɾua. tia kinsaɨn matiʔɨnɨɨʔɨna hor~ɾeʦu, ʔapuiʔi ʔor~ɾia tamna masiir~ɾar~ɾu ker~ɾi.
S.FORM: te pa maku tuturuʉn kumu'iing. nimikiananu sua hʉferiau uvʉngʉn na Ranyi, tia arisinatʉn marivuvuarʉ na cau. noo ka'anʉ pa tavara'ʉn aravariʉn iisua hʉferiau, tia uranʉn pasacarapʉ cau Iami. maatʉa, tia putucauʉn 'Oria siacʉ'ʉra takacicini. na usia vuanʉ matuun taniara to'urua. tia kinsaʉn mati'ʉnʉʉ'ʉna horecu, 'apui'i 'Oria tamna masiiraru keri.
S.PHON: te pa maku tutur~ɾuɨn kumuʔiiŋ. nimikiananu sua hɨfer~ɾiau uvɨŋɨn na r~ɾanji, tia ar~ɾisinatɨn mar~ɾivuvuar~ɾɨ na ʦau. noo kaʔanɨ pa tavar~ɾaʔɨn ar~ɾavar~ɾiɨn iisua hɨfer~ɾiau, tia ur~ɾanɨn pasaʦar~ɾapɨ ʦau iami. maatɨa, tia putuʦauɨn ʔor~ɾia siaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa takaʦiʦini. na usia vuanɨ matuun taniar~ɾa toʔur~ɾua. tia kinsaɨn matiʔɨnɨɨʔɨna hor~ɾeʦu, ʔapuiʔi ʔor~ɾia tamna masiir~ɾar~ɾu ker~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: 我也會要求相關部門，針對核 廢料儲存在蘭嶼的相關決策經 過，提出真相調查報告。在核 廢料尚未最終處置之前，給予 雅美族人適當的補償。同時，在尊重平埔族群的自我 認同、承認身分的原則下，我 們將會在九月三十日之前，檢 討相關法規，讓平埔族身分得 到應有的權利和地位。

I will also direct relevant agencies to present an investigative report on the decision-making process of nuclear waste storage on Orchid Island. Before finding a permanent solution for the nuclear waste, we will provide the Yami tribe appropriate compensation. At the same time, under the principle of respecting the Pingpu ethnic group's self- identity, and recognizing their identity, we will examine relevant laws before September 30 of this year, so that Pingpu ethnic group identity will receive the rights and status it deserves.

S.FORM: cenana isi maan ucani vuanʉ ucani taniara. te cu kita matiananai maritapasʉ, marivuvuarʉ Cau Vuvurung tamna niurina 'ʉnai. 'esi cu mapurai tuiisua farʉn sua tanasʉn. nuari sua Iencu mincu cʉcʉʉ ia, te cu arisuruusuru kiracʉkʉʉcʉkʉ. te kim mara'an mapurai "Iencu mincu cʉcʉʉ fa". "Iencu mincu tutii mataa hai'i fa". "Iencu mincu iyen facan fa". tia tacucuʉn na Rifa ien makaiikari.
S.PHON: ʦenana isi maan uʦani vuanɨ uʦani taniar~ɾa. te ʦu kita matiananai mar~ɾitapasɨ, mar~ɾivuvuar~ɾɨ ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna niur~ɾina ʔɨnai. ʔesi ʦu mapur~ɾai tuiisua far~ɾɨn sua tanasɨn. nuar~ɾi sua ienʦu minʦu ʦɨʦɨɨ ia, te ʦu ar~ɾisur~ɾuusur~ɾu kir~ɾaʦɨkɨɨʦɨkɨ. te kim mar~ɾaʔan mapur~ɾai "ienʦu minʦu ʦɨʦɨɨ fa". "ienʦu minʦu tutii mataa haiʔi fa". "ienʦu minʦu ijen faʦan fa". tia taʦuʦuɨn na r~ɾifa ien makaiikar~ɾi.
S.FORM: cenana isi maan ucani vuanʉ ucani taniara. te cu kita matiananai maritapasʉ, marivuvuarʉ Cau Vuvurung tamna niurina 'ʉnai. 'esi cu mapurai tuiisua farʉn sua tanasʉn. nuari sua Iencu mincu cʉcʉʉ ia, te cu arisuruusuru kiracʉkʉʉcʉkʉ. te kim mara'an mapurai "Iencu mincu cʉcʉʉ fa". "Iencu mincu tutii mataa hai'i fa". "Iencu mincu iyen facan fa". tia tacucuʉn na Rifa ien makaiikari.

"ienʦu minʦu tutii mataa haiʔi fa". "ienʦu minʦu ijen faʦan fa". tia taʦuʦuɨn na r~ɾifa ien makaiikar~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: 今年的十一月一日，我們會開 始劃設、公告原住民族傳統領 域土地。部落公法人的制度， 我們已經推動上路，未來，原 住民族自治的理想，將會一步 一步落實。我們會加快腳步， 將原住民族最重視的「原住民 族自治法」、「原住民族土地及 海域法」、「原住民族語言發展 法」等法案，送請立法院審議。

On November 1 of this year, we will begin to delineate and announce indigenous traditional territories and lands. The system of tribal public corporation is already in place. In the future, the ideals of indigenous self-government will be realized step by step. We will step up the pace and submit for legislative deliberation three laws of great importance to indigenous peoples: the Indigenous Peoples Self-Government Law, the Indigenous Peoples Land and Sea Areas Law, and the Indigenous Languages Development Law.

S.FORM: ca'aania soni, te cu kim matacuvucuvungu singcʉng hui'ii. te pa 'una tia tuturua sehu. nuari cecenana aru vuanʉ cani taniara. tia tumatuuturu Singcʉng ien, makananu cu niputukikioa sehu. mapurai Cau Vuvurung tamna risʉ cʉng'ii, 'apuciri Cau Vuvurung tamna cʉcʉʉ. isi sua tia putukikioa sehu.
S.PHON: ʦaʔaania soni, te ʦu kim mataʦuvuʦuvuŋu siŋʦɨŋ huiʔii. te pa ʔuna tia tutur~ɾua sehu. nuar~ɾi ʦeʦenana ar~ɾu vuanɨ ʦani taniar~ɾa. tia tumatuutur~ɾu siŋʦɨŋ ien, makananu ʦu niputukikioa sehu. mapur~ɾai ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna r~ɾisɨ ʦɨŋʔii, ʔapuʦir~ɾi ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ tamna ʦɨʦɨɨ. isi sua tia putukikioa sehu.

S.TRANSL: 今天下午，我們就要召開全 國原住民族行政會議。在會 議中，政府會有更多政策的說 明。以後每一年的八月一日， 行政院都會向全國人民報告原 住民族歷史正義及轉型正義的 執行進度。落實原住民族基本 法，達成原住民族的歷史正 義，並建立原住民族的自治基 礎，就是政府原住民族政策上 的三大目標。

Later this afternoon, we will convene a national indigenous peoples administrative meeting. In that meeting, the government will elaborate on the policies. On every August 1 to come, the Executive Yuan will report to the indigenous peoples our progress on restoring historical justice and transitional justice. To implement the Indigenous Peoples Basic Law, to serve indigenous historical justice, and to lay the foundation for indigenous self- government – these are the three major goals for the government's policy towards indigenous peoples.

S.FORM: te ku pookari 'esi sian. 'esi tiensʉ mataa 'esi cumacʉ'ʉra uangruu tangria Cau Vuvurung. cʉ'ʉrao kim! 'esi kara masicucuru. puraio kim! tuturuo kim! masii cucuru sehu mati'ʉnʉʉ'ʉna nipamucia.
S.PHON: te ku pookar~ɾi ʔesi sian. ʔesi tiensɨ mataa ʔesi ʦumaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa uaŋr~ɾuu taŋr~ɾia ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ. ʦɨʔɨr~ɾao kim! ʔesi kar~ɾa masiʦuʦur~ɾu. pur~ɾaio kim! tutur~ɾuo kim! masii ʦuʦur~ɾu sehu matiʔɨnɨɨʔɨna nipamuʦia.

S.PHON: te ku pookar~ɾi ʔesi sian. ʔesi tiensɨ mataa ʔesi ʦumaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa uaŋr~ɾuu taŋr~ɾia ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ. ʦɨʔɨr~ɾao kim! ʔesi kar~ɾa masiʦuʦur~ɾu. pur~ɾaio kim! tutur~ɾuo kim! masii ʦuʦur~ɾu sehu matiʔɨnɨɨʔɨna nipamuʦia.
S.TRANSL: 我要邀請在場的、在電視及 網路轉播前的全體原住民族 朋友們，一起來當見證人。 我邀請大家來監督，而不是 來背書。請族人朋友們用力 鞭策、指教，讓政府實現承 諾，真正改進過往的錯誤。

To all of our indigenous friends here and watching on TV and online: I invite you to stand witness. I invite you not to endorse, but to oversee. Please keep pressure on the government and right its course where necessary, so that it will realize its commitments and right historical wrongs.

S.FORM: te ku sosomanpe na kavangvang tangria Cau Vuvurung. iikamu marimia'ʉ kuka isi kavangvang cau. sua kiracʉkʉcʉkʉa mita 'ʉnai, mataa miana tamna niurina kari, cucuru kasakʉnʉʉn iisua. iimua tia vuʉn tatia nguain tamna nganai. nuari, te kita 'apaica mapurai putukikioa. masii sua macuvungu mataa nanamu mita. kavangvang monoon na 'ʉnai Taiwan isi. ka'anʉ cu ara'akia kari, ka'anʉ cu maroka cʉpʉngʉ, ka'anʉ cu aratʉkʉnʉ mataa takacicini tamna niurina uʉnhua. ka'anʉ cu macuvungu mamʉmʉkʉ na takacicini 'ʉnai.
S.PHON: te ku sosomanpe na kavaŋvaŋ taŋr~ɾia ʦau vuvur~ɾuŋ. iikamu mar~ɾimiaʔɨ kuka isi kavaŋvaŋ ʦau. sua kir~ɾaʦɨkɨʦɨkɨa mita ʔɨnai, mataa miana tamna niur~ɾina kar~ɾi, ʦuʦur~ɾu kasakɨnɨɨn iisua. iimua tia vuɨn tatia ŋuain tamna ŋanai. nuar~ɾi, te kita ʔapaiʦa mapur~ɾai putukikioa. masii sua maʦuvuŋu mataa nanamu mita. kavaŋvaŋ monoon na ʔɨnai taiwan isi. kaʔanɨ ʦu ar~ɾaʔakia kar~ɾi, kaʔanɨ ʦu mar~ɾoka ʦɨpɨŋɨ, kaʔanɨ ʦu ar~ɾatɨkɨnɨ mataa takaʦiʦini tamna niur~ɾina uɨnhua. kaʔanɨ ʦu maʦuvuŋu mamɨmɨkɨ na takaʦiʦini ʔɨnai.

S.TRANSL: 我感謝所有的原住民族朋友， 是你們提醒了這個國家的所有 人，腳踏的土地，以及古老的 傳統，有著無可取代的價值。 這些價值，應該給予它尊嚴。未來，我們會透過政策的推 動，讓下一代的族人、讓世世 代代的族人，以及台灣這塊土 地上所有族群，都不會再失 語，不會再失去記憶，更不會 再與自己的文化傳統疏離，不 會繼續在自己的土地上流浪。

I want to thank all of our indigenous friends. You remind everyone in this country that there is irreplaceable value in the land we tread on and the traditions we inherit. This value deserves dignity. In the future, we will push for policies to ensure that succeeding generations of indigenous tribes and all ethnic peoples in Taiwan never lose their languages and memories, that they are never separated from their cultural traditions, and that never again are they lost in a land of their own.

S.FORM: te pa ku musu'ʉvʉ maakari cau kavangvang mita. arakukunu kita kipaatasʉ, tarakanangʉ takacicini tamna nipaicaa cumacʉvʉrʉ. tarakanangʉ takacicini tamna 'ʉnai. tarakanangʉ karananana uʉnhua. cucuru 'arupamanʉngʉ, arakukunu musuruusuru. muukusa vo'oorua Taiwan tamna nuari. te ku musu'ʉvʉ na kavangvang kuka cau. 'apaica ramangʉ soni, kipaatʉsʉ kita tuiisua ucani cucuru 'una cʉng'ii tamna kuka. ucani karananana cau, nakai katʉʉtʉa kuka.
S.PHON: te pa ku musuʔɨvɨ maakar~ɾi ʦau kavaŋvaŋ mita. ar~ɾakukunu kita kipaatasɨ, tar~ɾakanaŋɨ takaʦiʦini tamna nipaiʦaa ʦumaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ. tar~ɾakanaŋɨ takaʦiʦini tamna ʔɨnai. tar~ɾakanaŋɨ kar~ɾananana uɨnhua. ʦuʦur~ɾu ʔar~ɾupamanɨŋɨ, ar~ɾakukunu musur~ɾuusur~ɾu. muukusa voʔoor~ɾua taiwan tamna nuar~ɾi. te ku musuʔɨvɨ na kavaŋvaŋ kuka ʦau. ʔapaiʦa r~ɾamaŋɨ soni, kipaatɨsɨ kita tuiisua uʦani ʦuʦur~ɾu ʔuna ʦɨŋʔii tamna kuka. uʦani kar~ɾananana ʦau, nakai katɨɨtɨa kuka.

S.TRANSL: 我請求整個社會一起努 力，認識我們的歷史，認 識我們的土地，也認識我 們不同族群的文化。走向 和解，走向共存和共榮， 走向台灣新的未來。我請求所有國人，藉著今 天的機會，一起努力來打 造一個正義的國家，一個 真正多元而平等的國家。

I call upon our entire society to come together and get to know our history, get to know our land, and get to know the cultures of our many ethnic peoples. Let us work towards reconciliation, a shared existence and shared prosperity, and a new future for Taiwan. I call upon all citizens to seize the opportunities offered by this day – to join together, work hard, and build a country of justice, a country of true diversity and equality.

S.FORM: sosomanpe kavangvang kinvaivaia!
S.PHON: sosomanpe kavaŋvaŋ kinvaivaia!
S.FORM: sosomanpe kavangvang kinvaivaia!

S.TRANSL: 謝謝大家。
Thank you all
